summary: Remediation attempt 1 passes the focused adapter suite and closes the previously reported freshness and established-shape failures, but terminal validation still accepts a parseable payload with no recognized terminal status/disposition because an empty string is compared to None.

testResults.notes: 78 Python tests passed; frontend phase passed 972 tests with 238 skipped.

remainingWork.requirement: A terminal result must have a recognized terminal status/disposition
Unrecognized parseable terminal evidence must be covered
remainingWork.remainingWork: Add a regression test for a parseable terminal-path JSON object with no recognized terminal status/disposition and rerun the focused adapter suite.
